parameters.content:
### FETCH: 3 Weimi API calls (prices, devices, orders)
Identical auth pattern as original workflow.
Credentials from n8n Variables.

### TRANSFORM + DB + REPORTS
Single code node builds ALL reports.
72 nodes → 30 nodes.
Supabase upsert runs in parallel.

### SEND: 6 emails + 1 Telegram
VOXMCC → MAF MCC team
VOXMM → MAF MM team
ALLMCC → superset (all MCC machines, incl. VOXMCC) — test recipient
OMD → cyril
IRIS → cyril
All → cyril + raffy
Telegram → 7707049890
